meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before Cheltenham Dragonboosts Handicap Chase

rankings.name: Scottish King
key_positive_factors: Last-out winner at this track and distance
Top official rating of 95 suggests class superiority
Philip Armson's 3lb claim provides essential weight relief
key_risks: Carrying a penalty for the recent victory
Risk of regression after a hard-fought win

rankings.name: Minella Kaiser
key_positive_factors: Trainer Chris Gordon has a dominant record at Plumpton
Consistent place form (332) prior to last disappointing run
Strong market support indicates expected improvement
key_risks: Disappointing 5th last time out needs explaining
Has become somewhat expensive for followers without winning

rankings.name: Gata Ban
key_positive_factors: Neil Mulholland and Richie McLernon are a high-strike-rate combination
Potentially well-handicapped if recapturing early season form
key_risks: Recent form (666) is visually very poor
Needs to prove wellbeing and enthusiasm for chasing

rankings.name: Felton Bellevue
key_positive_factors: Very consistent profile with a win and two places in last 4 runs
Harry Bannister is a reliable and tactical jockey
Stays the trip well and handles good-to-soft conditions
key_risks: Likely running to his mark with little hidden improvement
Finds a couple of these more progressive

rankings.name: Hilltown
key_positive_factors: Seamus Mullins stable is capable of training winners at this level
Ben Smith (7) claim brings the horse down to a very low weight
key_risks: Massive official rating deficit (OR 73 vs OR 95)
Poor completion record with U and P in recent form

tricast_top_3.combination: Scottish King > Minella Kaiser > Gata Ban

Scottish King > Minella Kaiser > Felton Bellevue
